content_body:
In the modern age of "all systems go" and an unending stream of technological interruptions, sometimes the simple things in life are the most restorative. Give your mind, body, and soul a break at our North Georgia cabin rentals without sacrificing the finer elements of a vacation. If you need the high-speed Wifi, smart TVs, and close proximity to activities, it's all there, but you always have the option to unplug entirely. 

Whether you’re planning a romantic getaway, a family reunion, or a memorable weekend with friends, our luxury cabins are equipped with all you could possibly need or want. Stop doom scrolling your way through travel ideas when the answer is just 90 miles north of Atlanta in Blue Ridge.

What Makes a Luxury Cabin in Blue Ridge?


Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek

Luxury in the mountains isn’t overstated...it’s thoughtful. It’s the comfort of a plush King bed layered with soft linens and comforters. It's the spacious master bathroom with a rock waterfall shower or spa-style bathtub. It's the indoor and outdoor furniture that doesn't sacrifice comfort for style. 

Our founders at Cabin Rentals of Georgia have traveled the country, taking note of what amenities and styles matter the most when staying at a vacation rental. In turn, our curated collection of privately-owned luxury cabin rentals match the high standards we uphold and provide for our guests. 

Cabins Rentals For Every Occasion

Riverfront Luxury Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge GA


Creekside Green

Experience ultimate serenity at our riverfront luxury cabins and let the rushing water wash over your mind. Enjoy the steady sounds of nature from the comfort of the plush outdoor furniture or curled up by a gas fire table.  

For the kids, enjoy being steps away from the water, perfect for tubing or swimming. For the anglers in your group, cast a line straight from your backyard and fish to your heart's content. 

Pet-Friendly Luxury Cabins in the Blue Ridge Mountains


Chase Mountain Dreams

As a family business, we understand the importance of traveling with all your loved ones, including those on four legs. Reserve one of our pet-friendly vacation rentals for close proximity to trails and room to roam. Indoors, pamper yourself with a King suite, gourmet kitchen, and stone fireplaces to make your mountain dreams come true. 

Blue Ridge Luxury Cabins with Hot Tubs


Cohutta Sunset

Arguably the most-coveted amenity of all, a hot tub is the crowning jewel to any luxury cabin rental. After a day spent exploring the mountains, return to your home away from home and relax with a glass of wine and a long soak. Perfect for adding a special touch to your romantic getaway, our luxury cabins with hot tubs are sure to add another spark of memorability to your visit. 

Large Group Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge GA


Fallen Timber Lodge

Bring your extended family and friends together in the North Georgia mountains with our side-by-side cabin rentals. Our family reunion or corporate retreat cabin rentals are perfect for groups of up to 50 guests! Enjoy enough space to gather together while also prioritizing quality time among those in your individual cabin. 

Luxury Cabins with Mountain Views


Above the Timberline

What would a mountain getaway be without a panoramic view? Add that extra touch of luxury to your stay by reserving one of our mountain view cabin rentals and become King of the world for a weekend. Revel in the long-range majesty of the Appalachian Mountains and enjoy solace and peace away from it all. Every season offers unique and beautiful views! 

Things to Do in Blue Ridge, GA

When adventure calls, take a drive to the activities that give Blue Ridge its charm and spark. Hike to The Swinging Bridge, ride the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway, or explore the shops, breweries, and art galleries in downtown Blue Ridge. From family-friendly activities to free things to do in Blue Ridge, there's always something around the bend to add to your experience.

Want to stay in? Book an in-cabin massage or let a local chef prepare dinner in your cabin. 

A Personalized Vacation Experience


Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

Since 2003, we have lived and breathed everything Blue Ridge. From understanding our cabins inside and out to knowing the best activities both on and off the beaten path, you can trust that your stay with Cabin Rentals of Georgia will be top-notch. 

With recommendations for adding a special touch to your romantic getaway or the best things to do for kids in Blue Ridge, we are ready and excited to help you make the most of your North Georgia experience. 

Take Advantage of Our August Special

In case you needed a little more incentive to start planning your stay, make sure to redeem our 3rd night FREE special on select cabins this August! As the summer season wanes, an off-season getaway is just what you need. Enjoy less crowds, cool evenings, and a little more time to make memories. Read more about this on our Specials page.

Book Your Blue Ridge Luxury Cabin Today


Aska Escape Lodge

So, why choose Cabin Rentals of Georgia? Choose a vacation rental company that prioritizes your comfort and enjoyment. From top-of-the-line amenities to area recommendations, your experience with us will leave you refreshed, renewed, and reconnected. 

The best part: our Guest Loyalty program offers you special perks and pricing for your next stay! 

Don't wait. Browse our available luxury cabins and start planning your next escape.
title: A Guide to Blue Ridge's Best Cabin Rentals
